channel.title: Mohamed Extradition on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Mohamed Extradition on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: The Daily Brief — Tuesday, April 7, 2026
item.description: Lindsayca's executives fly private while Guyana sits in the dark. CARIFTA ends with six medals. A Chinese acrobatic troupe is coming. Also: flood fears.

item.title: Wednesday Brief: Oil Hits $100, Mohameds Rejected Again, and Guyana's Last Independent Paper is Gone
item.description: Oil hits triple digits, the Court of Appeal delivers another blow to the Mohameds, Guyana's cash grant starts flowing to people who already have bank accounts, and we say goodbye to Stabroek News.
